programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up a fresh take on a Thai-inspired meal in around 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shows us that cooking comfort food doesn't require a full day in the kitchen.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It'll only take you around 30 minutes to impress your loved ones with chef Spencer Watts's budget-friendly Italian feast.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Stay in with celebrity chef Spencer Watts as he prepares traditional pub dishes in under 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In under 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up four hearty, rich, and mouth-watering French-Canadian dishes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It's Fajita Night in host Spencer Watts kitchen as he cooks up Mexican recipes in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Moroccan cuisine combines a million flavours and host Spencer Watts shows us how to bring that intensity home in a few simple steps.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts makes a delicious family meal in around 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It's Tandoori Take-Out night as host Spencer Watts prepares five quick and easy Indian dishes that take little time, but are big in flavour.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Vanessa Gianfrancesco creates a delicious seafood brunch menu.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her favourite Vegan Brunch recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Vanessa Gianfrancesco creates an international menu with brunch recipes from around the world.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Vanessa Giangrancesco shares her favourite Italian Brunch recipes

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up four delicious multi-cooker dishes.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Fast and Flavourful Dinners for Monday to Thursday
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco has your weeknight dinners covered with delicious recipes.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Weeknight Dishes made in Little Thyme
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancecesco has four recipes to make your life easy including Apple Butter Pork Chops and Rissotto.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a week’s worth of multi-cooker meals including Chicken Marbella and a decadent Chocolate Cake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a Peachy Pulled Pork, a velvety Key Lime Pie and other recipes in her multi-cooker.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: Mary and Andrew rendezvous in Montreal to taste eight Quebecers’ cakes. The top four bake “After Dark” cakes for a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The qualifying round ends in the East with eight Atlantic cake makers. Four are chosen to bake their “Bucket List” cake for the judges.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The top cake makers from each region come together in the CROSS COUNTRY CAKE OFF kitchen to bake for the grand prize in the national finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The West’s best cake makers present their creations to judges Mary Berg and Andrew Han. The best move on to bake for a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: Mid-Canada’s cake makers present their edible art. The best move on to bake a “Holiday Memories” cake in the Cross Country Cake Off kitchen.

programme.title: Holmes Family Effect
programme.desc: The Holmes family works to overhaul an entrepreneurial co-op when the global pandemic derails the project.

programme.title: Holmes Family Effect
programme.desc: Working Gear, a non-profit organization helping people with their fresh new start in the workforce, is overhauled.

programme.title: Holmes Family Effect
programme.desc: There are big changes at a youth center when the Holmes family helps to revitalize it.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Real estate partners, Odeen and Lamont, balance their complicated personal history with the launch of their new office and brokerage.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen and Lamont navigate a new stage of their relationship as they help with each other’s – separate – homes.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Lamont takes the lead to finish his and Odeen’s shared investment project, and Crystal ruffles feathers with staging Diana’s listing.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Pressure on Odeen and Lamont’s business ramps up with some unexpected news, while Odeen dives headfirst back into the dating pond.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen gets to work to sell a new luxury listing but her plans clash with Lamont when his DM deal could turn out as a date.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Lamont and Odeen spend more time together to pitch a client to take their business international, and an old friend returns to the office.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Pressure mounts among the WE Group agents with a big launch around the corner and Odeen’s schedule over capacity.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen and Lamont make plans outside of work, reluctant to label it a date. Crystal and Stefan clash over her new role and his priorities.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen’s sister Brittany flies into town and pressures Odeen to spill the tea on what’s really going on between her and Lamont.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen goes above and beyond to finish off the investment house to surprise Lamont but he may have a surprise of his own.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.desc: Autumn and Jillian begin the renovation of a 19th century inn in Stratford, Ont., starting with the smallest suite in the hotel.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.desc: The team tackle their first full-sized suite and the construction crew runs into a problem that could affect the entire renovation.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.sub-title: Double The Room, Double The Fun
programme.desc: Autumn and Jillian face a suite with twice the bathrooms and bedrooms.

programme.desc: The Holmes family works to overhaul an entrepreneurial co-op when the global pandemic derails the project.

programme.desc: Working Gear, a non-profit organization helping people with their fresh new start in the workforce, is overhauled.
